fields.Identifying_Data_Chief_Complaint: 39-year-old White male with schizoaffective disorder for medication check.
fields.Subjective: Patient presented appearing well-groomed and cheerful. Reports perfect adherence to cariprazine 6 mg daily taken each morning using routine. States feeling excellent. No hallucinations for seven months. No delusional thinking. Sleep excellent at 8 hours nightly. Appetite good, weight stable at 179 lbs. Working full-time as electrician, steady career for five years. Mood 'great' rated 8/10. Lives independently with girlfriend. Enjoys fishing and camping weekends. Attending therapy monthly for wellness. Four years sober from alcohol. Building life with partner. No safety concerns, denies SI/HI. (Evaluated by Dr. Paul Nelson, MD, Psychiatrist)

Mental_Status_Examination.Appearance: Casually dressed in work clothes, good grooming, positive demeanor

fields.Psychosocial_Context: Lives with girlfriend; employed full-time as electrician; four years sober; active outdoor lifestyle.
Assessment_and_Plan: Outstanding medication adherence and sustained remission.
fields.Author: Note written by Dr. Paul Nelson, MD, Psychiatrist — Trades Workers Mental Health, 4521 Industrial Way, Pittsburgh, PA 15201, Phone: (555) 772-4498, Fax: (555) 772-4499
